scope_notes: All paper text is SR5-only; CR7 and old hardware numbers are not used as first-party paper results.
The title, abstract, introduction, and problem formulation avoid naming cuRobo and avoid self-improving claims.
The learned branch is written as fallback-safe architecture plus a falsifiable efficiency hypothesis after the C4 NOT_SHOWN_SUPERIOR result.
PDF/page-count/undefined-citation build cleanup still requires a LaTeX installation.
